name: Demo Network Builder
description: A reference BACKEND plugin: builds a small valid PyPSA model (buses, hourly load, one generator per bus) entirely server-side, importing the bundled PyPSA source (backend/pypsa) to construct the network. The built model is written straight into the session — it never travels through the browser. Use this as a template for backend plugins.

grp_build.label: Demo network
grp_build.description: Build a tiny synthetic network on the server and load it into the session.

buses.label: Buses
buses.description: Number of buses; each gets one load and one generator.

build.label: Build & load into Ragnarok
build.description: Runs server-side, constructs the network with the bundled PyPSA, and loads the model into the session.
build.successMessage: Demo network built into the session.
